summary: Phase 3 Deferred Slice 3 is complete. A deterministic shared sound pack catalog provides 3 built-in packs (mute, blip, chime) with stable ids, labels, and event-to-tone metadata. Tests cover stable ids, metadata, fallback to mute, deterministic resolution, and mute behavior. A minimal WebAudio tone adapter synthesizes tones locally. App.tsx triggers sounds for click, switch, explode, and reminder events using the selected soundPackId. main.ts adds a Sound Pack submenu, preload.ts forwards selected pack ids, and no forbidden features were added.
evidence: src/shared/soundPacks.ts exports BUILT_IN_SOUND_PACKS with mute, blip, and chime
src/shared/soundPacks.test.ts covers stable ids, metadata, fallback, deterministic resolution, and mute behavior
src/renderer/soundPlayer.ts uses local WebAudio oscillator and gain nodes
src/App.tsx resolves sound commands and plays synthesized tones for existing click, switch, explosion, and reminder events
src/main.ts exposes a Sound Pack submenu in the existing pet context menu
src/preload.ts forwards selected sound pack ids via onSetSoundPack
No forbidden hotkey, plugin, backend, notification, external audio file, import/export, upload, or cloud behavior was detected
manual_verification_required: Right-click pet menu shows Sound Pack submenu with Blip, Chime, and Mute options
Selecting Blip or Chime makes click, switch, explosion, or reminder events produce synthesized audio
Selecting Mute disables all synthesized sounds
No hotkey, plugin, import/export, upload, notification, backend, cloud, or external audio file features are present
next_maker_instruction: Do not advance to another Phase 3 backlog item until the human manual gate is approved.
